mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_user where dept_id = #{deptId} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from sys_dept where del_flag = '0' and parent_id = #{deptId} limit 1
select * from sys_dept where find_in_set(#{deptId}, ancestors)
select count(*) from sys_dept where status = 0 and del_flag = '0' and find_in_set(#{deptId}, ancestors)
select * from sys_dept where dept_name=#{deptName} and parent_id = #{parentId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.update:
update sys_dept set status = '0' where dept_id in
#{deptId}
